revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: [[Category:New uncategorized original categories]]

revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「[[長野県]][[木曽郡]][[王滝村]]の建築物に関するカテゴリ。 {{DEFAULTSORT:おうたきむら}} [[Category:長野県の建築物 (市町村別)]] [[Category:王滝村|けんちくふつ]] {{座標一覧}}」

{{座標一覧}}

revision.comment: Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT:" to "{{citation needed|"
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="
Text replacement - "): (Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "): (Bot: update category metadata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on "
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[長野県]][[木曽郡]][[王滝村]]の建築物に関するカテゴリ。 {{DEFAULTSORT:おうたきむら}} {{座標一覧}} [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]
==Local Content== {{citation needed|おうたきむら}} {{座標一覧}} {{translated page|ja|Category:王滝村の建築物|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} {{translated page|ja|Category:王滝村の建築物|version=99788705}} [[Category:Architecture by Municipality in Nagano Prefecture]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Ōtaki, Nagano]] [[ja:Category:王滝村の建築物]] [[sn:This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on Ōtaki Ontake Shrine]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Ōtaki Ontake Shrine]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT:" to "{{citation needed|"

revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[長野県]][[木曽郡]][[王滝村]]の建築物に関するカテゴリ。 {{citation needed|おうたきむら}} {{座標一覧}} ==Local Content== {{citation needed|おうたきむら}} {{座標一覧}} {{translated page|ja|Category:王滝村の建築物|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} {{translated page|ja|Category:王滝村の建築物|version=99788705}}
[[ja:Category:王滝村の建築物]] [[sn:This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on Ōtaki Ontake Shrine]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Ōtaki Ontake Shrine]] [[Category:Categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Architecture by Municipality in Nagano Prefecture]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Ōtaki, Nagano]] [[Category:Categories]]
